reasons: structural dividend announcement unlocking shareholder value
high growth high margin 91% Y/Y AI segment included for free
mentions.text:
This is Japan’s largest Bottlemaker by the way.

Up 20.3% after my post today. 

> Seeing parallels like Toto the toilet maker with Memory vs. Yamamura the bottle maker with Photonics. 

Even after the increase, it’s still trading at $295M vs. $360M book value. 

Looks like markets is waking up to the structural dividend announcement last week, unlocking value to shareholders.

On top of that you get a high growth, high margin 91% Y/Y AI segment for free.
